explanations.37: min-width: 0 is a trick to let flexbox shrink content below its natural size, preventing text overflow in flex children.
explanations.41: This line animates two properties at once — the card moves up and its shadow changes — both using the same timing speed.
explanations.50: flex: 1 means this body section grows to fill all available space, pushing any footer content to the bottom.
explanations.63: white-space: nowrap forces the title onto one line, and text-overflow: ellipsis adds '...' if it's too long.
explanations.106: -webkit- prefixes are vendor-specific CSS for older browsers; these lines let text cut off after exactly 2 lines.
explanations.129: This hardcodes the height to 180px instead of using the CSS variable defined at the top, which is inconsistent.
